entry.title: Re: Cycle Counting Error , Material found: old stock=0
entry.content: can you share the detailed screenshot of error here?

entry.title: Re: SAP SBO SDK SAPbouiCOM.WebBrowser - SAP 10 FP2111
entry.content: The SAPbouiCOM.WebBrowser has a way to communicate back with the application. The SDK documentation includes this object that should provide the necessary information to work on the SDK side. However, there is no documentation I could find that shows how to actually send the message from the browser. Can you help there? See: https://help.sap.com/doc/089315d8d0f8475a9fc84fb919b501a3/10.0/en-US/SDKHelp/SAPbouiCOM~SBOWebMessageEventArg.html

entry.title: Re: SAP FIORI - Upload General Journal Entries
entry.content:
Not necessarily the app is not active.

A very common reason for such error is the user not having access to such app. Ideally those 2 should be in the same catalog so anyone how can access one of them will be able to call the other one.

entry.title: JOB EC-LMS keeps failing after maintenance
Professional Service : Copy Project with Staffed Resource
entry.content:
Hi,
Contexte
In SAP Public Cloud, for a professional Services Project, we create our project in copy of a project template with use the Fiori app "Plan Customer Projects". These templates are used as the starting point for new projects, and contain staffed resources for the different WBS of the project.

Issue
Currently, when we use the "Copy project", and select "Work Packages, Services, and Resources", the resources are not being copied. We are looking into the feasibility of copying resources in this public cloud project. Anyone has seen this before? 
We activated the scope 6J0 and also found this OS Note: 2700550 , however configuration point is not available.
Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio: How to Convert yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss (Str...
entry.content: <delete>

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio: How to Convert yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss (String) to yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss (Timestamp)
entry.content:
Hi @bene4

 

Thank you for your response. I tried the SQL you provided, but the same error appears.

When I executed only the Replace statement on "yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss", it was successfully converted to "yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss". Therefore, based on the error message, I'm wondering if there's an issue with the "yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss" format. I also tried specifying "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS" (uppercase), but the same error occurred. I think I'll do some more research.

Best regards,

Maki

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence

entry.title: Re: Power of Attorney vs. Payment Approvers: Key Differen...
entry.content: No, if we change in the approvers at bank account level, the Power of Attorney functionality will not be affected.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA TM– Conversational planning using Generative AI!! step by step configuration walkthr
entry.content:
@ZenonK : its yet to be available under https://www.sap.com/products/artificial-intelligence/use-cases.html

In case you need demo, reach out to SAP accounting team or SAP Premium Engagement team at your customer. They will be able to arrange a demo.

entry.title: Re: How to stop Sending RFQ by Email to Vendor Automatically
entry.content:
Hi! If you want to stop automatic RFQ emails from being sent to vendors in SAP S/4HANA, you can check these things first:

  1. Check the Output Determination for RFQ in SPRO:
    Go to SPRO → MM → Purchasing → Messages → Request for Quotation → Output Determination
    Look for message type AEN or similar and either deactivate the condition record or set output type to ‘NEU – Print Only’ instead of email.
  2. Check if Email Output is Enabled in NACE or BRF+, depending on whether your system is using classic or BRF+ output management.
  3. Check Vendor Master (XK03 / BP) - see if an email ID is maintained under communication. If yes, and output is active, system might auto-send.

 

Just to clarify is your system using BRF+ for output control, or classic NACE? That will decide where exactly you need to deactivate it

entry.title: Re: SOAP API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) did...
entry.content:
Hi Chuma

Thanks for the reply.

I know this is an asynchronous process, but when I checked the invoices in the SAP system (which were used in this request) after some time, I found that their status was still not cleared. So I suspect that this clear operation has not been executed successfully, that's why I need to find the execution result log.

entry.title: Insurance Manual Task Creation - Activity Management
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We’re currently configuring manual task creation within the SAP Insurance Claims Management module in ECC, and I’d appreciate your help!

We would like to define a fixed list of manual tasks for claim handlers to select from via the dropdown in the “Create Manual Task” pop-up in the claim overview screen.

So far, I have:

  1. Created the task via IMG path:
    Claims Management > Activity Management > Define Tasks, Log Entries, and Activities

  2. Assigned the task to the correct internal claim type version via:
    Claims Management > Claim > Define Internal Claim Types > Permitted Manual Tasks/Log Entries

Despite this, when I try to create a manual task from a claim, the task dropdown is empty.

Are there any additional configuration steps, authorizations, or missing dependencies (e.g., activity categories, language entries, processing types, etc.) I should check?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Cloud ALMのBW向けのセットアップガイドと、ガイドに記載が有る適用必須なNoteの差異について
entry.content:
下記ガイド見てCloud ALMのBW向けセットアップをしています。
https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/setup-managed-services/setup-abap-740.html?anchorId=section_406552075_co_80551802

セクション「Technical Prerequisites」に 3530899
の適用が必要と記載が有りますが、Noteの中身を見ると「This note is only relevant for ERP systems. 」との記載が有り、ガイドとNoteに差異があります。

Cloud ALMを利用するうえで必要なBWシステムでの設定として、DIGITSの適用は不必要という理解で正しいでしょうか？



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALMのBW向けのセットアップガイドと、ガイドに記載が有る適用必須なNoteの差異について
entry.content:
はい、ご認識の通りです。
ERP/S4HANAタイプのABAPシステムのみBusiness Process Monitoring（BPM）がサポートいます。
BWシステムにて、Business Process Monitoring に関するノートを適用する必要はございません。

entry.title: Re: Inside ABAP Conf 2025: Innovation, Insight, and the Power of Community
entry.content:
Thank you for your feedback and encouragement @Jelena_Perfiljeva 

The in person events are great and getting them locally is difficult way down here at the bottom of Australia in Melbourne.  But we do run our own community events and I had some good discussions with fellow SAP community location group member, @walid, to discuss how events are done in different places and think of creative ways we can crank them up. So in that regard it was inspiring too. But getting the chance to mix with like minded people in different regions really helps open up to new ideas and confer on the similarities too.

I am also keen to catch up on all the talks I missed from the other sites. Vienna was a particularly glam location, nice work 🙂

entry.title: Re: 交易性金融资产需要当客户/供应商管理，同时需要指定现金流
entry.content:
Hi Yanxi,

以下APP或者API均含有“金融交易类型”字段，可能在不同APP的中文描述不一致，但字段是同一个，具体信息也可以参考附件。

1. 创建进项发票APP：银行现金科目的行项目明细界面中点击“更多”后弹出的对话框中的“事务类型”字段即为“金融交易类型”字段。

2. 过账付款和付款清账APP：银行现金科目的行项目明细行展开后可以找到“金融交易类型”字段。

3. API：不确定你提到的API具体是哪个，但以标准API Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous) 为例，可以参考链接https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b978f98fc5884ff2aeb10c8fdeb8a43b/2c0ccd5780726264e10000000a4450e5.html?state=DRAFT 找到“金融交易类型”字段。

Kind Regards,

Lynette Sun

entry.title: Re: 物料主数据中的销售文本如何批量维护？
entry.content: Hi @Ping, to share this valuable information with other customers, I have translated you solution in English and Accept this as Solution on behalf of you. "Mass creation for Material master data can be done vie Data Migration approach".

entry.title: Re: Introducing the SAP Cloud SDK for AI (JavaScript/TypeScript) 🎉
entry.content:
Hi Community，

Can we try to add and really support this model "anthropic--claude-3.7-sonnet"? It will works with new version of Go very well .

New versions of Go (like Go 1.21 or 1.22) introduce syntax or semantics changes which gpt-4o can not recognize very well. So we want move to the model "claude".

Even the DOC here https://github.wdf.sap.corp/pages/AI/generative-ai-hub-sdk/_reference/README_sphynx.html  show our community support this "anthropic--claude-3.7-sonnet", but in  SDK of @SAP-ai-sdk/foundation-models, I don't think it really support it now.

entry.title: Re: 统驭科目记账屏幕放出利润中心/自定义字段
entry.content:
Hello @YANXI ,

  1. 对于客商维度（对应统驭科目），无法直接添加利润中心字段。建议通过凭证分割派生的方式实现客商的利润中心确定(Document Splitting Characteristic for General Ledgers)
  2. 激活利润中心的凭证分割后，在对方科目行（如收入/费用科目）过账时填入利润中心，对应利润中心可以被派生至AR/AP中
  3. 通过API过账时同理，利润中心填入对方科目行

Kind Regards,

Please find below link for more details on the available adapters. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/6d52de87aa0d4fb6a90924720a5b0549/a3bd115449e7bb29e10000000a44538d.html

Saravanan

Authorization Objects Used by MDG, Consolidation and Mass Processing | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Incorrect delivery status "complete" after partial de...
entry.content: Remove the tick against Relevant for Delivery since you are trying to change the existing configuration and system will not allow such text item categories to set this box.  Once it is saved successfully, either with an existing TR or new TR, come out of the screen and again now try to remove the Item Type with NEW transport request.  If this is a production issue, you can move this new TR to PRD

entry.title: Re: Netting in Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
@rakhmatilla_tuganov wrote:

In this blog post, I would like to cover a small yet useful functionality in the Accounts Payable (AP) module of SAP S/4HANA: Netting of Accounts Receivable (AR) and Accounts Payable (AP). While researching this topic online, I found limited end-to-end documentation, so this blog is aimed at filling that gap with a clear walkthrough.

Scope of the Blog

  • Create a Business Partner and extend it to Supplier (FI) and Customer (FI) roles

  • Create AR and AP invoices

  • Execute netting using the Automatic Payment Program (APP)

1. Create a Business Partner and Extend It to Customer and Supplier Roles

First, create a Business Partner (BP) who will act as both a supplier and a customer. To do this, use the "Maintain Business Partner" app.

  • Select "Organization" as the BP type.

  • In the "Business Partner (Gen.)" role, go to the "Payment Transactions" tab and maintain the Bank Details (Bank Key, Account Number, IBAN, etc.) as shown in the screenshot below:

Next, extend the same BP to the following roles:

  • Customer (FI)

  • Supplier (FI)

Within the Company Code section of each role, ensure the following:

  • In the Payment Transactions tab, specify a Payment Method that will later be used in the APP.

  • Tick the "Clearing with Vendor"/"Clearing with Customer" checkbox. This setting is critical for enabling netting between AR and AP.

Finally, under the Supplier (FI) role, make sure to fill in the Customer Number in the General Data section to establish the link between the customer and supplier accounts:

2. Create AR and AP Invoices

Now, create AR and AP invoices using the customer and supplier accounts created in the previous step. A few important points to remember:

  • Leave the Payment Method field empty in both documents. If it is filled, the APP will treat them as separate payments, defeating the purpose of netting.

  • Ensure that the total payable amount is greater than the receivable, so that the APP will generate a net payment for the difference.

This ensures that the system can offset the AR and AP balances during payment processing.

3. Schedule the Automatic Payment Program (APP)

Use the "Manage Automatic Payments" app to execute the netting process:

  • Create a new parameter run and enter the relevant Customer/Supplier number, Company Code, and Payment Method.

  • Ensure the invoices are due on the payment run date.

  • Run the Payment Proposal and check the results.

If everything is configured correctly, you will see a single payment that offsets both open items and pays only the balance.

Conclusion

This simple configuration allows you to reduce unnecessary cash flows and administrative efforts by settling AR and AP balances for the same business partner via netting. Although small, this functionality can be very useful in real-world business scenarios—especially when dealing with intercompany transactions or recurring vendors who are also customers.

Regards,
Rakhmatilla Tuganov

Hello @rakhmatilla_tuganov,
This blog fills a critical documentation gap by providing a clear step-by-step guide on netting AR and AP in SAP S/4HANA. The walkthrough ensures smooth execution, from setting up a Business Partner to processing invoices efficiently. Well-structured and highly useful! kroger feedback



Best Regards,
James Batson

entry.title: Re: SSAM2310 Previous meter reading not fetching to Mobil...
entry.content:
Hi please check your exchange framework filter, by standard sap has some exclude filter enabled, disable that. Also have a close look on your exchange log table /*/*eabl.

Also check filters and data distribution read filters of your omdo id *meter*reading.

entry.title: Implementing nested line items in a Fiori application using RAP.
entry.content:
Hello expert,

We are developing a custom Fiori application for SAP Public Cloud. The requirement is to generate a nested line item at runtime. Based on the user's input number, the corresponding sub-line items should be dynamically displayed on the same screen.

Does anyone have an idea about how to develop this type of requirement or implementation ?

entry.title: Traslape en tabla de cuotas patronales para Cesantia y Vejez
entry.content:
Hola!

Nos han reportado un caso que me será muy útil conocer su opinión al respecto. Se trata de la tabla 2025 para las cuotas patronales de Cesantía y Vejez.

Considerando el Salario Mínimo General y la UMA actuales, la tabla vigente es la siguiente:

Esto significa que si, por ejemplo, un trabajador percibe el salario mínimo, 278.80 pesos, ese importe se ubica en dos rangos diferentes de la tabla: en el 1er rango que va de 0.01 a 278.80 pesos, y también en el 4to rango que va de 227.41 pesos a 282.85 pesos. 

En el primero, el patrón contribuye con 3.150%; en el cuarto con 4.954%

Las preguntas que tenemos son: ¿cuál de los dos rangos se debe considerar? ¿El primero o el cuarto? En este escenario ¿qué resultado genera el SUA?

Si la respuesta, legalmente correcta, es que se debe aplicar el cuarto rango, entonces los primeros tres rangos de la tabla no tienen aplicación en la práctica.

Agradezco de antemano sus comentarios basados en su experiencia. Estos nos ayudarán a decidir qué debemos hacer de nuestro lado.

where a.TableID='opor'
and b=(As per FieldID)

entry.title: ZBPR is missing, once updated but not reflecting for all users at the same time
entry.content: Any changes in price master or customer master once updated is available instantly for the user who has updated it but not for other users for 3 -4 hrs or next day.

entry.title: I am currently working on a custom Ui5 app, where i use third part software to access documents
entry.content:
My custom Ui app is using Alfresco server to fetch documents, I make the call via a API portal, which is accessed via a BTP destination.

 

it works well, but it needs a x-api-key in the http header, when i make a request call.

I am looking for best solution to pass this x-api-key in the request, I want to hardcode it in the code, 

I have tried adding this to additional parameters of the destination, it does not work, 

I have passed encrypted key as well, but it also returns unauthorized.

Any idea on how can i pass this x-api-key securely to my http request via BTP destination?

 

any use case for SAP credentials store foe such requirement?

SAP Fiori Launchpad @ui5_dev SAP BTP Security development tools for SAP BTP, Neo environment JavaScript SAP Fiori for SAP ERP

entry.title: Re: I am currently working on a custom Ui5 app, where i use third part software to access documents
entry.content: Some corrections: 1. Custom Ui5 application 2. i dont want to hardcode this in the code

entry.title: Beyond SAP Cloud - Episode 26: Terraform scripting
entry.content:
In this tutorial, we guide you through creating a Terraform script for BTP (Business Technology Platform). The script focuses on setting up two directories and five sub-accounts, following specific naming conventions and a landscape setup explained in earlier sessions. Key steps include defining resources for directories and sub-accounts, assigning unique identifiers, and linking sub-accounts to their respective directories. We also explain how to configure environment-specific sub-accounts, including development, acceptance, and production, and provide insights into using Terraform's provider documentation for further customization.

Takeaways

  • The script demonstrates how to create a Terraform configuration for SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP).
  • The configuration involves creating two directories and five sub-accounts, in line with the naming conventions discussed in an earlier session.
  • The script starts with the creation of directories in BTP, defining them as resources with unique identifiers.
  • The directories are named according to a specific convention: <sequence nr> - <name> (<dir acronym>)

    • 1 – Administration (ADM)

    • 2 – Applications (APP)

    • 3 – Database (DB)

  • Each sub-account is assigned a unique name following the naming conventions: : <sequence nr DIR><sequence nr SA> - <DIR acronym> - <stage name>

    • SA sequence nr 🡪 0 = SND, 1 = DEV, 2 = ACC, 3 = PRD

    • 10 - ADM – SND

    • 14 – ADM – PRD

    • 21 – APP – DEV

    • 22 – APP – ACC

    • 23 – APP – PRD

  • The region specified for the trial account is US10, but this can be adjusted depending on the actual account region.
  • Beta features can be enabled, though the account is not intended for production usage.
  • The parent ID is used to link each sub-account to the respective directory (either administration or application directory).
  • The script includes the creation of both administration and application sub-accounts with varying environments: development, acceptance, and production.

entry.title: Automatic PO not created in S/4 HANA Public Cloud after Send price to external system from Ariba Sou
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are currently facing the following issue:

After sending the awarded supplier quotation from Ariba Sourcing to the external system (S/4HANA Public Cloud), the purchase order is not being created automatically. The quotation is successfully transmitted and is visible in the RFQ within S/4HANA, but the expected automatic PO creation is not taking place.

Kindly share your suggestions.

Thanks and regards,

Shubham B

entry.title: Re: Sum up values of MDF object on parent object
entry.content: @heikeklews Thanks for suggesting this. I tried it and the rule is not triggered( checked via business execution log). I made the field as transient and created object configuration in manage data as below and added the rule which sums the parent - amount field. There are no On Load rules in UI as well.

entry.title: Re: Deep Insert in Unmanaged RAP
entry.content: Informative blog Steps are clear and practical explanation—very helpful

entry.title: How to Integrate Primavera P6 Activities into SAP PS Using SAP CPI?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’ve recently received a requirement from my client to integrate Primavera P6 schedules/activities into SAP Project System (SAP PS) using SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI).

This is a new scenario for me, and I haven’t worked on Primavera integrations before. The goal is to transfer WBS elements, network activities, and dates from Primavera P6 into SAP PS, so that project planning and execution can stay in sync.

Any guidance, example iFlows, mappings, or relevant blog links would be highly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: IAS/IPS – Efficient Group Setup?
entry.content: Please check risk based authentication in IAS which controls Azure groups fed in via Identity federation group mapping and then routes to SAC

entry.title: How to cancel not completed project stock order
entry.content:
We don't want to use project stock order any more and would like to know how to process the current not completed project stock orders.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to cancel not completed project stock order
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

For in process or requested project stock orders, you need to open them, select not completed line items, firstly click Cancel, then click Complete.

For project stock order line items whose delivered quantity is greater than consumed quantity, you can refer to this blog to return project stock back to inventory.

Henry

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Launch SAP BW process chain from Fiori
entry.content: The answer was to create a remote function and call the function module as a remote function module. That way it works.

entry.title: Single Warehouse Order needs to be created for multiple deliveries with single line item.
entry.content:
Requirement is to create Single Warehouse Order for multiple deliveries with single line item. Can this be achieved in Standard SAP EWM? If so, kindly provide the possible configuration and steps to execute with the Basic EWM system configuration.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Single Warehouse Order needs to be created for multip...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Yes, it is achievable in standard SAP EWM.

 

  1. Please make sure that the activity area(the location of the source stock) of the picking task are the same for all the outbound deliveries items.
  2. Please make sure that there is no more limitation for warehouse order creation rule , below is the relevant Customizing:
  •  "Define Creation Rules for Warehouse Orders "
  •  "Define Limit Values for the Size of a Warehouse Order"
  •  "Define Filters for Warehouse Order Creation Rules"

 

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: CCode XYZX: Fiscal year change 2025 has failed for some fixed assets (Message number AU271) SAP
entry.content: Dear lyl86, The issue in this case was caused by certain assets that had not yet been posted but nonetheless contained a date in the “Depreciation Calculation Start Date” field (ANLB-AFABG). Once we removed the date from this field—leaving it blank—the year-end closing process could be successfully executed. I hope this information proves helpful to you. Kind regards, Emal Rahman

entry.title: Re: Understanding ABAP Pipeline Engine used for Data Integration in Datasphere
entry.content:
Very good description @bheemeshRao !

I've asked for this kind of information under several SAP blogs during the last two years... but everybody kept it like a secret 😞 ... finally I understand how this all comes together ... and why we had to implement so many S4 notes for getting this working error-free. 😁

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud: How do I build dynamic “Current-Year vs. Prior-Year” KPIs
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’m building a dashboard in SAP Analytics Cloud – Analytics Designer where the user enters a year (e.g. 2025) and the app should immediately show:

  • Bruttogewicht Lieferung (current year)
  • Bruttogewicht Lieferung (prior year)
  • Bruttogewicht Lieferung (prior-prior year)
  • an automatic %-deviation between current year and prior year (Numerical Point widget)

It means, that the user can input the current year in the input field, our script calculates the prior and prior-prior year and gives us the results. 

What I already have:
An InputField for the year

  • A Numeric Point (Chart_4) with two feeds
  • ValueAxis → Primary value
  • ValueAxis2 → Comparison value

  •  

  • Working script that filters all charts to the three selected years:
ds.setDimensionFilter("BDATU_JAHR", { values: [year, year-1, year-2] });

Script that removes all measures from the Numeric Point and adds two IDs:

chart.addMeasure("ValueAxis", "BG_2025"); chart.addMeasure("ValueAxis2", "BG_2024");

–> works fine if the Restricted Measures BG_2025, BG_2024, … already exist.

Pain point:
I don’t want to create a new Restricted Measure every single year manually. I had the following idea: 

Have three reusable Restricted Measures (current year, prior, prior-prior). Change their year filter (value in the dimension, used for the restriction) dynamically in script or swap them in/out without maintaining dozens of hard-coded IDs? My question is: Can I simply create 3 restricted measures: current year, prior year and prior-prior year and just change the dimension-value (2025, 2024, 2023 and so on), using scripting? 

My code, that I have created so far looks like that. Here I just works with different restricted measures for each year, that I created manually. I do not want 2025, 2024, 2023, but rather: : current year, prior year and prior-prior year, which 'filters' (years) will be changed dynamically.

/* ───────── 1. Wert aus dem Eingabefeld holen ───────── */
var actualYear = InputField_1.getValue();
var current_date = new Date().getFullYear();

// Zeichenfolge in das Datum konvertieren
var yearNum = ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(actualYear);

if (yearNum >= 1931 && yearNum <= current_date) {
	// Aktuelles, -Vor und -Vorvorjahr berechnen
	VariableAktualYear = yearNum;
	VariablePastYear = yearNum - 1;
	VariablePastPastYear = yearNum - 2;	
	
	var msg_1 = VariableAktualYear.toString();                           
	var msg_2 = VariablePastYear.toString();
	var msg_3 = VariablePastPastYear.toString();
	
	/* Daten quelle des Charts holen und den modifizieren */
	var ds = Chart_1.getDataSource();

	ds.setDimensionFilter("BDATU_JAHR", {values: [msg_1, msg_2, msg_3]});

	
	/* ───────── 2. Measures tauschen ───────── */
	//var measAct  = "BG_" + msg_1;       
	//var measPrev = "BG_" + msg_2;
	//Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, measAct);
	//Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, measPrev);
 
	// 23735103-3540-4518-3856-333700453218 - Jahr 2025
	// 42543347-2523-4283-3882-314686436141 - jahr 2024 
	// 32937114-7011-4110-3663-482995517414 - Jahr 2023
	// 29229304-1622-4153-3546-241342908683 - Jahr 2022
	
	var idMap = {
	  2025 : "23735103-3540-4518-3856-333700453218",
	  2024 : "42543347-2523-4283-3882-314686436141",
	  2023 : "32937114-7011-4110-3663-482995517414",
	  2022 : "29229304-1622-4153-3546-241342908683"
	};
	
	var measAct = idMap[msg_1];
	var measPrev = idMap[msg_2];
		

	var chart = Chart_4;
	var measures = Chart_4.getMeasures(Feed.ValueAxis);
	
	for (var i = 0; i < measures.length; i++) {
		chart.removeMeasure(measures[i], Feed.ValueAxis);
		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, 'Removed: ' + measures[i]);
	}
	
	Chart_4.addMeasure(measAct, Feed.ValueAxis);
	Chart_4.addMeasure(measPrev, Feed.ValueAxis);

	
	/* ───────── 2. Measures tauschen ───────── */

	
	// Check
	Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, 'Aktuelles Jahr: '+ msg_1);
	Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, 'Vorjahr: '+ msg_2);
	Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info, 'Vorvorjahr: '+ msg_3);
	
	Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Success,
        'Jahr ' + actualYear + ' übernommen.');

} else {
	var msg_4 = current_date.toString();
	Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error, 'Bitte eine vierstellige Jahreszahl (1931–' + msg_4 + ')');

I hope, you could help me with this issue.

entry.title: Re: Contract request fails to send to SAP S/4HANA via CIG...
entry.content:
Hi Shella,

It seems required Integration tasks are not disabled. Could you please refer the below documentation. 

Contract Management with SAP Ariba Contracts (4AZ) | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: High delay UI5 development in BAS in a specific project
entry.content: maybe I was affected extensions that requires a network connection(However, I still haven't been able to identify which ones are causing the issue.But disabling Joule made things much better)

entry.content: How to register to this event?

entry.title: Budgeting in Fund Management for commitment item and Fund centre combination
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

We have a requirement to use the fund management for budgeting such that:

  • If the actual postings exceed the budget at fund centre level- System should through an error while posting
  • If the actual postings exceed the budget for commitment item and fund centre combination, it should through warning in case the budget at fund centre level has not exhausted.

Is there a possibility to setup fund management to fulfil this requirement?

 

Thanks in Advance!

Priyanka

entry.title: API_EQUIPMENT - Patch Operation Update for Standard Fields
entry.content:
As per business requirement, I have added Equipment  field User status ( standard field ) in  Standard API_EQUIPMENT  using CDS extended option.

GET Method : It is fetching the Equipment User status value successfully using Get method via Postman.

PATCH Method:  While Updating the Equipment user status is  getting failed using  Patch Method via Postman.

Kindly suggest me how to update the newly added standard fields value using PATCH Method for API_EQUIPMENT.

 

 

 

Regards,

 

S Surya

entry.title: Re: A 25x faster mta.yaml build for SAP CAP Node.js projects
entry.content: @DavidBrodmann I explain the reasons in this session from reCAP 2024. But it's basically to give you control on what you're deploying and avoid dependency issues.

entry.title: Exception aggregation behaves differently
entry.content:
Hey Guys, 

I use exception aggregation regulary but  now I met a strange example and I am wondering if someone could explain me how it has happened. 

I have a data mart adso with the data:

0CALMONTH   Material  Plant   GUID     Tool life
202505                1                 10     $sad         200
202505                1                 10     $DAD       200

I wanted to make exception aggregation on tool life . Because for each month I wanted to show the average of value. 

When I set exception aggregation on 0CALMONTH sadly it has calculated 400 for tool life instead / CALMONTH so it did not work as I wanted. What strange for me is that when I set the exception aggregation based on guid it worked as I wanted it only show  values for each month once. 

But I am not sure why it works like that. It behaved totally the opposite that I am used to .
Could you explain Why I need to set the reference on guid  so it calculate the monthly last value for each material ? 
I understand it that because this is the only value that differ on row level but for the concept of exception aggregation it behaves totally the opposite I would expect it to work

entry.title: Re: Why my read in behavior implementation only called when edit
entry.content: We need more information then just this line. We are not magicians to know your enviornment. There can be many reasons

entry.title: [SAC] - How to set the Story filter's active members?
entry.content:
As far as I know, there is a method called `setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy` that can control the members of a story filter. However, the effect I want is that when we enter a SAC page, the number of members in a story filter remains unchanged, but the selected values change. It seems to me that this cannot be achieved through scripting. Does anyone have any ideas?

Example:
By default, all options in the story filter (Fiscal Year Period) are selected:

When we enter a SAC page, the script can set it to look like the image below, with only 2009002 and 2010002 selected:

The above is the result I hope to achieve.

However, I found that only the `setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy` method can control changes to the Story Filter, and the result of this change is as shown below. But this result is not what I want because the other members are missing:

So my questions are:
1. Besides `setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy`, are there other methods to set the values of a story filter?
2. Is there any other way to achieve the effect I want?

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Business Data Cloud - S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content: Thank you Shailu for the great content!

entry.title: Re: 🚀 SAP AI Core Agent QuickLaunch Series 🚀 - Part 7: Building the Chat UI with SAPUI5
entry.content: @Ryota_Ito  Thank you for the series of great blogs. That will be even better if you can showcase how to bring the chat app to mobile, for example, with MDK similar to the approach at https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-mobile-dev-kit-rest-api.html

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud: How do I build dynamic “Current-...
entry.content:
@denys_zhhuta 

Have three reusable Restricted Measures (current year, prior, prior-prior). Change their year filter (value in the dimension, used for the restriction) dynamically in script or swap them in/out without maintaining dozens of hard-coded IDs? My question is: Can I simply create 3 restricted measures: current year, prior year and prior-prior year and just change the dimension-value (2025, 2024, 2023 and so on), using scripting? 

I think the idea is to make the restricted measures dynamic in terms of year selection. Restricted Measure do have the option to be restricted  by Input controls. So you can create the restricted measure using Input control and then set the Input control selection using scripting. The Input controls could be hidden if  required. The below API could be used for Input control setting.

setSelectedMembers of  InputControlDataSource

https://help.sap.com/doc/1639cb9ccaa54b2592224df577abe822/release/en-US/index.html#InputControlDataSource_MsetSelectedMembers

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Terms file created under document when doing Import f...
entry.content:
Hi Radhakrishnan,

Export to Excel will have terms file in documents tab. The term file will typically be kept up to date so that future additions can be made and import into the contract terms.

Please refer the below documentation:
Creating a Contract Terms Excel Document From Contract Compliance

entry.title: Cleaner than a Spacestation Surgeon’s Scrubs – Why Clean Cores Matter So Much
entry.content:
Marco Pierre White, restaurateur and youngest ever chef to earn three Michelin stars, once said: “Cooking is a philosophy; it’s not a recipe.” The same can be said for RISE with SAP. Simply being part of the journey is no guarantee of success on its own – customers will only truly benefit if they start by ensuring they have a clean core right at the heart of their business. Thankfully, SAP Cloud ALM is on hand to help achieve this.

 

Keeping it Lean & Clean

The clean core concept is a modern approach to designing business processes and extensions in a stable, upgrade-safe, and transparent way. Perhaps best described as a mindset and philosophy (there’s that word again), it’s supported by governance and policies that lay the foundation for a flexible, future-ready Cloud ERP.

When we talk about having a clean core, we’re essentially referring to the 5 dimensions or principles of the core shown in the graphic above. Let’s take a closer look at each of them.

 

Keep processes flexible: Customers need to make sure they design and implement their business processes in a flexible manner that allows for adaptation and customization – flexible in a way that accommodates their changing business needs, regulations, or industry requirements.

 

Keep extensions clean: To minimize complexity and any potential conflicts with future updates or upgrades, customers must ensure that any custom extensions or modifications made to their ERP system are implemented in a cloud-compliant manner.

 

Keep data lean: To be able to get rid of as much unnecessary data as possible, customers need to implement sound strategies such as archiving or purging outdated or redundant information in order to promote data integrity, performance, and efficiency.

 

Keep the landscape reliable: Landscapes are often complex, substantial and challenging. Customers need to maintain a reliable and robust integration framework within their ERP system, making sure seamless communication and data exchange takes place between their different systems or modules to help minimize errors and disruptions.

 

Keep operations effective and efficient: Customers must also focus on effective and efficient IT operations, including system monitoring, maintenance, and support, to ensure smooth and reliable performance of their ERP system, maximizing productivity and minimizing downtime in the process.

 

 

SAP Cloud ALM for the Cleanest of Cores

Using SAP Cloud ALM as part of the overall system strategy is a vital piece of the puzzle towards achieving the cleanest of cores. It gives customers an environment in which they can manage their clean core projects along SAP Activate and the 5 dimensions mentioned above, while simultaneously providing them with analytics and traceability dashboards to track adherence to clean core criteria.

At the same time, customers get actual guidance rather than a truckload of options that may only confuse their judgment, giving them a unique opportunity to re-assess their ALM processes. By standardizing and streamlining their ALM processes, businesses can then shed unnecessary customization, leaving sufficient time and scope to leverage innovations instead – not just as a one-off event, rather month after month, year after year.

 

 

The RISE with SAP Methodology Dashboard, a critical and essential tool that helps to address the evolving needs of SAP customers, has moved from SAP for Me and now resides within SAP Cloud ALM itself. Customers now have a comprehensive system overview at their fingertips, as well as the robust SAP Cloud ALM environment enabling them to make daily deliveries and deployments of new functionalities.

When coupled with other services such as the recently launched Transformation Preparation Service for SAP Business Suite (included as an embedded services offering for all eligible and relevant customers within the RISE with SAP journey), time-to-value is improved and accelerated: presales visions are transformed into tailored transformation roadmaps that support and guide customers throughout their transformational journey better than ever before.  

 

Minimize Customization, Maximize Standardization

The main 3 challenges for any customer about to embark on their transformation are how best to deal with custom code, custom processes, and custom integrations. We can help customers navigate these jungles by using SAP Readiness Check, quality gates, and other features and APIs offered by SAP Cloud ALM.

For instance, SAP Readiness Check helps customers analyze and evaluate the impact of their custom code, allowing them to set up follow-up actions and discover best practices for migrating their custom code to clean core-compliant environments, ensuring smooth and efficient system performance.

 

 

Secondly, instead of creating a multitude of custom processes, focusing on standardized content and thoughtful process design can help customers consume tasks from SAP Activate and Best Practice content, ensuring consistency and enhancing efficiency. The RISE with SAP Methodology Dashboard gives clarity on any system deviations from SAP recommendations, ensuring they can address gaps and fully align with best practices, all the while tracking their clean core progress through quality gates and other useful features.

 

Finally, by unlocking the power of standard APIs (including OData and SOAP) and using the APIs and events available on SAP Business Accelerator Hub, customers can learn how to master the art of creating loosely coupled integrations. By leveraging the built-in integration available in SAP Cloud ALM and using expert insights gained through Integration Monitoring, they can keep things running smoothly as they move towards achieving a true clean core.

 

 

Hear more about the clean core, RISE with SAP and other SAP Cloud ALM benefits at the SAP ALM Summit EMEA 2025 in Darmstadt, Germany (Oct 21-23). Sign up today to join us and other top industry experts! Feel free to share this within your community network and, as always, thanks for reading!

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements + RAP: How to preserve order of batch...
entry.content:
If you want the order to be exactly the same as when scanned, there is probably no way around custom code.
On the one hand, in the frontend with a controller extension and in the backend with an action and then call create with EML.

Something like this (pseudo code): 

// table select event
onSelectionChange: {
const selectedItem = event.getParameter("listitem")
this.selectedItems = this.selectedItems.concat(selectedItem)
}

printButtonPressed: {
executeAction("printAction": {items: this.selectedItems}).then(table.removeselection)
}

entry.title: Re: How to keep SAP Master Data Governance (MDG) customizing in sync with SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
SAP provides mainstream maintenance for SAP Solution Manager 7.2 until December 31, 2027.

So how to keep MDG customizing in sync with SAP S/4HANA without solman?

entry.title: Technical Error when calling Project Element Badi
entry.content: When we change the Project Manager of a specific Project ID, we encounter the error Technical Error when Calling Project Element Badi. Can you please advise how to troubleshoot such issue?

entry.title: Re: HRRP_REP (Replicate Runtime Hierarchy) not displaying all hierarchies
entry.content: hi, in my case, it is the opposite: all groups are reported correctly, except 0109 (GL accounts, FSV). When running HRY_REPRELE, for class 0109, the system displays the standard org units (chart of accounts) but none of the ones we have created. I have checked the OSS note 3335763, but it seems to be not relevant (we get the error in our system that it cannot be implemented). Is there anything else we can do? thanks,

entry.title: Re: Properties from associated entity via personalization...
entry.content:
Hi Carl,

Fiori elements for ODATA V4 does not propose another option than the manifest configuration in your example to have navigation properties available on the p13n if they are not defined at LineItem level.

 

Kinds regards.

Gwendal

entry.title: Re: Sum up values of MDF object on parent object
entry.content: @Sri_bs The object configuration contains the onLoad rules for the "Manage Data" UI. If you want to define onLoad rules for the config UI, you need to assign the rules as described here: https://me.sap.com/notes/2314757.

Hello Team,

 

I would like to know is there any template available for requirement gathering from client to do some changes in SAP :

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud: How do I build dynamic “Current-...
entry.content: So you mean, Instead of binding the year filter of your restricted measures to "2025," etc., I should bind it to an input control. If I change the value of this input control later in the script, the restricted measure will automatically jump to the new year?

entry.title: Re: Getting ICMENOSESSION error while calling SAP S4 webservice from SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi @Ulrich_Schmidt ,

As per the SAP 'clean core' strategy strongly encourages external interaction to go through clean and documented APIs. In that case, I believe SOAP or ODATA is preferrable. Please share your suggestion further. 

Regards,

Souvik

entry.title: Re: SAP TM Condition for Calculation Resolution Base STAGE
entry.content: Hello, I can't. We have to use calculation profil at header level because we are using "massification": pallets quantity are grouped together to calculate freight charge

entry.title: Re: Develop Powerful Analytical Queries using ABAP Core Data Services (CDS)
entry.content:
Hello Alberto,

the OLAP cache you know from BW-queries on top of BW InfoProvider (ADSO, HCPR) is not available. The OLAP cache is in sync with the data from the InfoProvider. This is possible, since the BW controls the data flow. In CDS this is not possible. Furthermore,  the data the Analytical Engine selects is user dependent (DCL!). This is not foreseen in the concept of the OLAP cache.

Only a local cache is available, which is used during a user session.

At the moment "dynamic Cache" is the only session independent cache. There are plans for a "static cache" which is similar to "dynamic cache" but more integrated with CDS. Also annotations are planned to control the usage of this cache for a single CDS analytical query.

Regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning with connection to ERP System
entry.content: Hello William_Yu, thank you for your reply. I'm familiar with planning in SAC and the connection to the S/4 system. I'm interested in planning in SAC with the connection to the ERP (R/3) system.

entry.title: Re: How to add REVLV field in ME2L/ME2M Report
entry.content: Hello Sir, kindly provide sample code for reference.
